markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on kickoff next steps and the strategy sprint roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Focus:** GrowthX will own SEO/GEO content to drive visibility, freeing Panther's team for sales enablement and product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Process:** A 3-phase sprint (Kickoff → Calibration → Operating Cadence) will build a content OS, targeting 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Review:** Katie will be the primary reviewer to prevent bottlenecks; she will tap technical experts only for specific fact-checks.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Panther will provide platform access (GA, GSC, Framer) and brand assets; GrowthX will manage publishing, coordinating around Framer's deployment freezes.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Scope

  - [**GrowthX Focus:** SEO/GEO content to drive visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Method:** Analyze competitors (e.g., Wiz) and data (search volume, keyword difficulty) for quick-win opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [**Collaboration:** GrowthX provides data-driven topics; Panther adds nuance (e.g., competitive wins) for prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Panther's Use of Profound:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Value:** Excellent for content ideation, brief generation, and optimization of existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [**Limitation:** Poor for full article generation due to context limitations (e.g., 500-character prompt limit).](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Generation Advantage:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Method:** Uses agentic research and fact-checker agents to feed unlimited context into drafts, ensuring quality.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [**Overlap:** GrowthX will provide a similar prompt/AI visibility tool for comparison with Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Strategy Sprint Roadmap

  - [**Goal:** Build a "Content OS" (roadmap) and publish \~5 articles by sprint end.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Phase 1: Kickoff & Deep Dive**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Kickoff call with core team.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Product deep dive with product marketing for platform nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
      - [**Output:** Brand/audience artifacts and the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Calibration**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Publish one "calibration article" to align on quality and process before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Phase 3: Operating Cadence**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Scale production to 2–3 articles/week, with a goal of 5/week.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Logistics & Process

  - [**Platform Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [**Google Analytics & Search Console:** Ana to provide access.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [**Framer (CMS):** Ana to coordinate access.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Owner:** GrowthX will stage and publish approved content.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Framer's deployment freezes (up to 1 day) block publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Coordination:** GrowthX will join the Panther Slack channel tracking freezes to plan around them.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**Problem:** Over-engineering reviews is the primary bottleneck to scaling content.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [**Solution:** Katie is the primary reviewer. She will tap technical experts (e.g., Michael) only for specific fact-checks, not full article reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ana:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [Follow up with Will to ensure contract signature.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX access to Google Analytics and Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Coordinate Framer CMS access for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Katie:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [Share brand guidelines, personas, and other resources via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Compile a list of technical reviewers for specific fact-checks.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [Send email with sprint roadmap and resource list.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [Schedule January kickoff call after contract is signed.](https://fathom.video/share/k4qSTVSXWx9Jr5MWE6hG_kZExpHcCjSq?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
